---
title: "Helen Frances Church"
---

## Helen Frances Church

**Dates:** (Russia 1826/7-1905)

**Maiden name:** (Bennett)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Henry Bennett

### Biography

Her mother was Emily Moberly (sister of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly) and she married (1853) the Rev. Richard William Church (1815-1890), who was stepbrother to Mary Ann (Crokat) Moberly.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 21st 1882
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
